---
title: "Unified Allometry Outputs and BigQuery Schema"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Purpose

Inspect the unified flat schema that combines `infys` volume rows and `dina`
biomass rows.

Source scripts:

- `../mia-allometric/R/05_build_unified_clean.R`
- `../mia-allometric/R/06_build_sqlite_unified.R`
- `../mia-allometric/R/07_export_parquet_unified.R`

The source paths assume `mia-tutorials` and `mia-allometric` are sibling
repositories. Replace `../mia-allometric` with your local source-repo path if
your checkout differs.

```{r}
library(here)
library(jsonlite)

schema_sql <- readLines(
  here::here("data", "mia_allometric", "schema_unified.sql"),
  warn = FALSE
)
bq_schema <- jsonlite::fromJSON(
  here::here("data", "mia_allometric", "bigquery_unified_schema.json")
)

cat(paste(head(schema_sql, 80), collapse = "\n"))
head(bq_schema)
```

## Unified table sections

- provenance: `source_dataset`, `source_record_id`
- geography: state and UMAFOR fields for volume rows
- taxonomy: raw and standardized scientific names
- equation text: raw, normalized, NumPy expression, WD-fixed expression
- applicability: DBH and height range fields
- response and parse status

```{bash}
cd <path-to-mia-allometric>
Rscript R/05_build_unified_clean.R
Rscript R/06_build_sqlite_unified.R
Rscript R/07_export_parquet_unified.R
```

Downstream handoff: the generated unified parquet is the package data consumed
by `miaproc.biomass.load_packaged_equations()`.
